steps.title: Identify what the task requires
steps.content: The goal is to provide an example of an epistolary novel. This requires naming the novel and explicitly identifying it as epistolary—otherwise, the reader doesn't know the example demonstrates the concept.

steps.title: Apply the requirement to the choices
steps.content:
Choice B explicitly identifies On Earth We're Briefly Gorgeous as an epistolary novel while showing it consists of letters.

Choices A and C fail to identify the example as epistolary, while D provides only a definition without an example.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
